title: Files are being overwritten in Write File node
symptom: When saving files in a loop using the Write File node, only one file is created and it gets overwritten with each iteration.
not_this_if: Files are being saved with unique names
No loop is involved in the workflow
root_cause: The Write File node is using a static file name or an expression that does not generate unique names for each iteration, leading to the same file being updated repeatedly.
fix_steps: Change the file path in the Write File node to use a unique identifier, such as '/files/clip_{{$runIndex + 1}}.txt'.
Ensure that the loop is correctly configured to increment the index for each iteration.
agent_instruction: Update the file path in the Write File node to include a unique identifier for each file.
